primary_trigger_condition: Price rallies from ~$4,562 back into $4,570–$4,582 resistance (descending channel top + daily 20 EMA ~$4,590) and prints a bearish rejection — lower high confirmed after May 25 rejection at $4,580
primary_entry_signal: 15M bearish engulfing or pin bar rejection closing below $4,570 at the $4,570–$4,582 zone with volume expansion on rejection candle
flip_trigger_condition: Price drops through $4,540 directly toward $4,505–$4,515 channel floor support WITHOUT triggering SHORT first, OR price breaks and closes above $4,610 invalidating the SHORT — then pulls back to new demand zone
flip_entry_signal: 15M bullish engulfing or hammer candle closing above $4,508 at the $4,505–$4,515 support zone with volume confirmation on reversal candle
notes: May 26 — First full US trading day after Memorial Day (May 25 US was closed). Gold closed May 25 at ~$4,562 after rejecting the $4,570–$4,590 zone intraday (high $4,580) — lower high confirmed in descending channel from April 21 $4,833 peak. DXY at 98.96 (-0.28%), US10Y at 4.57%. Kevin Warsh confirmed Fed Chair May 13 (hawkish). Iran peace deal 'largely negotiated' per Trump — Strait of Hormuz 60-day ceasefire draft agreed, formal signing imminent. WTI crashed ~5% to $91 on deal news. CRITICAL RISK: Iran deal formal announcement today = gap-down risk for gold. If announced before entry, stand aside and wait for price to stabilize before re-engaging. $4,540 Doji zone = minor resistance between FLIP entry and TP — watch for stall there. R:R 1:2 on both setups.
